word: H4313 - מֵי הַיַּרְקֹון - Mêy hay-Yarqôwn - may hah'-ee-yar-kone' - Me-jarkon

sections.paragraph:
Original: מי היּרקון

Transliteration: mêy hayyarqôn

Phonetic: may hah'-ee-yar-kone'

BDB Definition:

Me-jarkon = "waters of yellowness"
  1. a town in Dan near Joppa

Origin: from H4325 and H3420 with the art. interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
